title: 宝塚記念の後に・終わりなき惜敗

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she loses to T.M. Opera O, Meisho Doto is
ecstatic to come in second.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching from the sidelines, Air Shakur asserts
that the two have reached their full
potential—but Opera O's total stats still outweigh
Doto's, and neither compare to the previous
generation's powerhouses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is there really a ceiling cap to their skills? If so,
can it be shattered? We head for the autumn
Tenno Sho, weighed down with anxiety.
